set.body: Release close-out benchmark command: AMATRIX_OPENCL_PROBE_GPU=1 bash tools/benchmark-regression.sh --against-baseline --output-dir=tools/benchmark-results/20260702-regression-check. It completed the 45-cell loop but exited 134. Evidence: dense MLX workers failed with Abort trap 6 / NSException; sparse CPU, MLX, and Metal spectral workers also aborted; final process terminated with uncaught cl::Error clGetDeviceIDs. Partial bundle written under ignored tools/benchmark-results/20260702-regression-check with incidents.csv and summary.csv. Need minimal repro first, then fix or mark backend unavailable before release benchmarks can be trusted.
set.title: Benchmark regression crashes on Apple Silicon backend workers
